title: Swallowing Issues in Stroke Victims: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Support
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures, commonly known as ginger tincture, may help with difficulty swallowing due to its anti-inflammatory properties and natural compounds like gingerols and shogaols. These constituents have a soothing effect on the digestive system, particularly on the esophagus and throat, which can become irritated or inflamed, causing swallowing problems. When taken internally, the bioactive compounds in ginger tincture may help reduce inflammation and ease spasms in the e...
